name: Dan Heng
description:
“Do you want anything else?”

✧ In which you're just two childhood friends going through college life.

modern au

It's been 999 years... DH had time to do a full cycle and be reborn... as this very cool student. I've been very busy with finding a job and studies so this is where it comes from (copecopecope). I'm a sucker for simple things... sue me. Save me Dan Heng... Dan Heng save me... ; v ; I still intend on taking inspiration from what a few comments have recommended! If anyone has a request, feel free. I'm back for more Dan Heng.
creator: Muguet
